actions.boundary: Skull acoustics and BBB subspot dose can use the same CT-space voxel spacing.
actions.rationale: The segmentation is already defined on the CT planning lattice.

references.boundary: not executed by the Chapter 25 script; synthetic outputs must be generated outside this repo, registered to the planning lattice, and quality checked before use
references.name: cWDM
references.role: paired high-resolution 3D medical image translation; missing brain MRI modality synthesis from available modalities; CT-to-MR or MR-to-CT is treated as a paired-translation candidate only when a trained checkpoint and output NIfTI are supplied

references.boundary: MRI-only bridge; it does not provide skull CT acoustics and cannot make an MRI-space case CT-backed
references.name: SLaM-DiMM
references.role: missing T1w, T1ce, T2w, or FLAIR MRI synthesis from available brain MRI modalities

references.boundary: not a substitute for expert GBM segmentation unless target-label validation and local review are added
references.name: NV-Segment-CTMR
references.role: research 3D CT/MR segmentation reference for anatomical prompt-based masks

requirements.boundary: required for same-patient skull-acoustic GBM treatment simulation
requirements.name: ct_segmentation_pair
requirements.required_for: skull phase correction, attenuation, reflection, and CT-space BBB dose

requirements.boundary: sufficient for tumor geometry but not for skull acoustics
requirements.name: mri_segmentation_pair
requirements.required_for: GBM target delineation and MRI-space subspot geometry

requirements.boundary: required before an MRI-derived tumor mask can become CT-backed
requirements.name: ct_mri_pair
requirements.required_for: same-subject CT/MRI registration and CT-space tumor transfer

registration.message: RITK NIfTI read and metric-guarded registration executed
